heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 150712 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15071236:441., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 427, § 1167 Stat. 565
